column1: #   name    mode        path                                      probe_or_expect       expected_stdout  flags
#   c-run       Positive fixture. Compare `emit-c` text, then clang-link a driver that
#               calls probe_or_expect as `uint32_t fn(void)` and compare runtime output.
#   diag        Negative fixture. `emit-c` must fail; compare exit status and normalized
#               diagnostics. probe_or_expect is the required diagnostic code.
#   llvm-object Positive fixture. Compare `emit-llvm` text, then, when `llc` and `clang`
#               are available, lower to an object, link a driver, and run it.
# Use `-` for an unused expected_stdout or flags field.
# The manifest is intentionally tiny for P0. Grow it by adding checked-in rows instead
